name: thekdatepicker-monorepo
description: A framework-agnostic date/time picker library with themes.
author: thekster

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/ThekDatePicker && npm run build -w packages/ThekDatePicker-vue
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/ThekDatePicker && npm run test -w packages/ThekDatePicker-vue
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run -w packages/ThekDatePicker && npm run test:run -w packages/ThekDatePicker-vue
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/ThekDatePicker && npm run lint -w packages/ThekDatePicker-vue
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w packages/ThekDatePicker && npm run lint:fix -w packages/ThekDatePicker-vue
scripts.format: npm run format -w packages/ThekDatePicker && npm run format -w packages/ThekDatePicker-vue
scripts.format:write: npm run format:write -w packages/ThekDatePicker && npm run format:write -w packages/ThekDatePicker-vue
scripts.release:check: npm run lint && npm run format && npm run build && npm run test
